summary: Tested Video Highlights feature (Gemini AI analysis). All 21 backend API tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Features verified: video upload, Gemini AI analysis, highlights list, share link generation, public shared page, delete. Both player and venue owner can access Highlights.

issues: Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - add DialogDescription for accessibility

passed_tests: GET /api/highlights/shared/{shareId} - Public access to shared highlight (200)
GET /api/highlights/shared/{shareId} - Returns 404 for invalid share ID
POST /api/highlights/{id}/share - Enable sharing and generate link (200)
frontend_tests_passed: Highlights page loads with upload section
Drop zone for video upload visible
Analysis dialog opens with summary, sport, duration badges
Key moments list displays timestamps and descriptions
Share button visible in analysis dialog
SharedHighlightPage displays summary and key moments
Error page displayed for invalid share ID
Highlights nav link visible for player
Highlights nav link visible for venue owner
Mobile: Highlights icon in bottom nav
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent missing aria-describedby - add DialogDescription component for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed highlights created and deleted during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video Highlights feature fully working. Existing highlights in DB: 'Big Buck Bunny Test' (completed with analysis, share_id: 1479d3c2) and 'Weekend Football Match' (failed status due to fake file). Test video at /tmp/real_test.mp4 (788KB). Gemini 2.5 Flash AI analysis via emergentintegrations library is LIVE (not mocked). API endpoints: /api/highlights (GET/POST upload), /api/highlights/{id} (GET), /api/highlights/{id}/analyze (POST), /api/highlights/{id}/share (POST toggle), /api/highlights/shared/{shareId} (GET public), DELETE /api/highlights/{id}.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payments: MOCKED - falls back to mock mode

highlight_upload.details: Video upload with progress, max 100MB, stores in /app/backend/uploads/videos/

highlight_list.details: Lists user's highlights sorted by created_at desc

highlight_analyze.details: Gemini 2.5 Flash analyzes video, returns summary, sport, key_moments with timestamps

highlight_share.details: Toggle generates/removes 8-char share_id, public access via /highlights/shared/{shareId}

highlight_delete.details: Deletes DB record and video file from disk

shared_highlight_page.details: Public page displays title, summary, key moments without auth

mobile_responsive.details: Mobile nav has Highlights icon, page layouts responsive

player_access.details: Player role can access all highlight features

venue_owner_access.details: Venue owner role can access all highlight features
